bands.name: UV

cards.name: Why understand window film basics?
cards.description: Window film is more than just a product. It is science, technology and protection. Understanding the basics helps you make the right choice for your health, comfort and investment.
features: Protects you from harmful UV and heat
Protects your car, home and business
Good tint is an investment, not an expense

articles.title: What is Window Film?
articles.description: Learn what window film is, how it works and the many benefits it brings.

articles.title: Why Window Film?
articles.description: Discover why window film is essential for vehicles, homes and buildings in ASEAN.

articles.title: Why ASEAN Climate is Different?
articles.description: Understand the intense sun, high heat and humidity that make protection critical.

articles.title: How Window Film Works
articles.description: See how window film blocks heat, filters light and protects your surroundings.

articles.title: The Sunlight Spectrum Explained
articles.description: Understand UV, visible light and infrared energy and their impact on you.

articles.title: What is TSER?
articles.description: The total solar energy rejected and why it matters more than you think.

articles.title: The True Cause of Interior Fading
articles.description: It's not just UV. Learn what really causes fading, cracking and damage.

articles.title: Window Film Protects What Matters
articles.description: From your skin and eyes to your car interior and home furnishings.

_unplaced.learning-progress: Rail widget: 'Learning Progress — 0% Complete — Complete all lessons to get your IrisPro Basics Certificate. — Start Learning Journey'. Progress state is dynamic and out of scope for content.
_unplaced.spectrum-behaviors: The band behaviors (blocked/transmitted/reduced) are derived from the hero's outcome bullets, not explicit on the diagram — flagged for confirmation.
_unplaced.mir-fir-display: The fourth band reads '2500nm – 1mm' on screen; toNm is numeric so it is stored as 1000000 (renders 2500–1000000nm) — display limitation flagged.
